LanguageData.GravshipRaids.CrashlandedGravship.GameSt:
Sirens. Tearing metal. The smell of scorched wiring.

Your gravship's gravlite core failed somewhere over this rimworld, and the hull came apart on the way down. The crash sealed your three cryptosleep caskets shut before the ship stopped moving, which is the only reason you're still breathing.

The wreck outside will never fly again. There is no engine left to salvage, no console left to pilot. Whatever you can strip from its hull is all you have left.

Your caskets are about to open.
LanguageData.GravshipRaids.CrashlandedGravship.Messag: The cryptosleep caskets have opened. Your colonists are waking up, dazed from the crash.
